mapper.select:
(
SELECT p.POST_SN AS contentSn, p.BBS_TYPE AS bbsType, p.POST_TTL AS title, p.POST_WRTR_SN AS userSn, u.USER_NM AS writerName, p.CO_SN AS coSn, p.COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, p.POST_FRST_WRT_DT AS createdAt, p.DEL_YN AS delYn, p.BBS_SCOPE AS scope, p.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt FROM TB_POST p JOIN TB_USER u ON p.POST_WRTR_SN = u.USER_SN WHERE p.DEL_YN = FALSE
AND p.BBS_SCOPE = 'PUBLIC'
AND p.CO_SN = #{coSn} AND p.BBS_SCOPE IN ('PUBLIC', 'COMPANY') OR p.COHORT_SN IS NULL
AND p.CO_SN = #{coSn} AND ( -- PUBLIC은 언제나 허용 p.BBS_SCOPE = 'PUBLIC' OR ( -- 나머지는 조건 검사 ( p.BBS_SCOPE IN ('COMPANY', 'COHORT') AND (p.COHORT_SN = #{cohortSn} OR p.COHORT_SN IS NULL) ) OR (p.BBS_SCOPE = 'PRIVATE' AND p.POST_WRTR_SN = #{userSn}) ) )
)
UNION ALL ( SELECT s.SRVY_SN AS contentSn, s.BBS_TYPE AS bbsType, s.SRVY_TTL AS title, s.USER_SN AS userSn, u.USER_NM AS writerName, s.CO_SN AS coSn, s.COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, s.SRVY_BGNG_DT AS createdAt, s.DEL_YN AS delYn, s.SRVY_SCOPE AS scope, s.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt FROM TB_BBS_SURVEY s JOIN TB_USER u ON s.USER_SN = u.USER_SN WHERE s.DEL_YN = FALSE AND s.CO_SN = #{coSn} AND s.COHORT_SN = #{cohortSn} AND s.SRVY_SCOPE IN
#{scope} )
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
